title: Geodesic Configuration
description: Configuration file for the Geodesic Auto-Topology Agent engine.

provider.description: AI provider to use for synthesis.

apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider. Not required for ollama.

model.description: Model identifier to use. Uses provider default if omitted.

analystId.description: Your identifier recorded in the attestation chain (email or full name).

crystalStoreRepo.description: GitHub repo slug for the shared Crystal Store (e.g. 'myorg/geodesic-crystals').

crystalStoreToken.description: GitHub Personal Access Token with repo read and write scope.

outputDir.description: Directory for analysis output. Defaults to geodesic-findings/ inside the analyzed repository.

embeddingDeploymentName.description: Azure deployment name for embeddings. Falls back to local ONNX if omitted.

ollama.description: Optional configuration for Ollama local provider.

extendedThinking.description: Enable extended thinking on supported models (Anthropic Opus only). Increases cost significantly.

noCrystalSync.description: Skip GitHub Crystal Store sync. Use for air-gapped environments.

maxConcurrentRepos.description: Maximum number of repos to analyze simultaneously.
